LightningComponentBundle.description: Global site header with GBTA branding, configurable navigation menu, cart, wishlist, search, and language selector

property.name: menuName
property.label: Navigation Menu
property.description: Select the navigation menu to display in the header (configured in Settings > Navigation)

property.name: logoUrl
property.label: Logo URL
property.description: URL of the header logo image (displayed at 36px height). Leave blank to show GBTA text fallback.

property.name: logoAlt
property.label: Logo Alt Text
property.description: Accessible alt text for the logo image

property.name: searchPageApiName
property.label: Search Page API Name
property.description: Experience Cloud page API name to navigate to when the search icon is clicked

property.name: cartPageApiName
property.label: Cart Page API Name
property.description: Experience Cloud page API name to navigate to when the cart icon is clicked

property.name: wishlistPageApiName
property.label: Wishlist Page API Name
property.description: Experience Cloud page API name to navigate to when the wishlist icon is clicked

property.name: languageLabel
property.label: Language / Region Label
property.description: Text displayed next to the globe icon (e.g. 'United States | EN'). Leave blank to hide.

property.name: languagePageApiName
property.label: Language Page API Name
property.description: Experience Cloud page API name for the language/region selector
